attributes.name: Beginner 2 (Alpha) - Saturday 11:15am
attributes.description: NOTE: Please read the description for your registered class time.Class Time: 11:15am - 12:15pm Practice/Free time: 11:45am-12:15pm. Beginner 2/Alpha Second beginning level skating class for ages 6-17 Class curriculum: Forward Stroking Forward Crossovers left over right. Forward Crossovers right over left One foot snowplow stops. Two-foot turn  Backward Stroking Right T-Stop There are no refunds, make ups or credits for missed classes.
